---
title: "Ying"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yij050@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12052859/
---

::::::::::: profile-card
:::::::::: bio-list
::: {.bio-item .level-1}
🇺🇸 UCSD (M.S. in Business Analytics) 📊
:::

::: {.bio-item .level-1}
🇨🇳 SUIBE (B.M. in International Accounting) 📘
:::

::: {.bio-item .level-1}
🇯🇵 SISU (Minor in Japanese) 🇯🇵
:::

::: {.bio-item .level-1}
🇺🇸 UCLA (Exch. in Marketing) 🌴
:::

::: {.bio-item .level-1}
🇨🇳 KPMG Shanghai, Audit Associate 🏢
:::

::: {.bio-item .level-1}
🇺🇸 USCPA Tutor 📚
:::

::: {.bio-item .level-1}
🇬🇧 ACCA Affiliate (ACCA) 📑
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
